subject: FW: St. Thomas to Paris options
body:
________________________________

From: LVJET@aol.com [mailto:LVJET@aol.com] 
Sent: Friday, April 11, 2008 9:02 AM
To: JEEPROJECT@YAHOO.COM
Cc: Rahna Jalashgar; kellens@earthlink.net
Subject: St. Thomas to Paris options


Option #1
St. Thomas - Santa Maria (Acores) (2368 miles) 4+43 min (wind +64 kts).
Santa Maria - Paris 3+03 min (1398 miles) (wind +23 kts).
TOTAL  flight time 7+46 min  (not including 1 hour on the ground for
fuel).
 
Option #2
St. Thomas - Santiago SPAIN (3198 miles)  6+29 min (wind +66 kts). (need
perfect weather for this stop).
Santiago - Paris 1+21 min (580 miles) (wind +29 kts).
Total Flight Time 7+50 min    (not including 1 hour on the ground for
fuel).
 



________________________________

Planning your summer road trip? Check out AOL Travel Guides
<http://travel.aol.com/travel-guide/united-states?ncid=aoltrv00030000000
016> .
